column11: Message
enquiry.visitor.activated
room.pci-disclaimer
room.join
hello
Hi! 😊 Thank you for reaching out to CINNOX. This is Tony. How may I help you?
I want to create a number that can be assigned to 10 sales representatives to answer calls. Do I need to upgrade my account?

Could I have your service domain?
xxxx.cinnox.com
Let me check how is your current plan and agent number limit
zz@hkwmdyhh
I mean like "hkwmdyhh".cinnox.com
You havent create service yet?
Seems like already have one
hkwmdyhh this one
Can I use this number to set up a call queue now? But I can't add users.
I see you currently set it destination as PSTN +852 number
You could add agent as the service destionation'
By change queue setting
I cannot add employee accounts; the account addition prompts me to contact sales.
You have only one agent account at the moment
SHould I contact sales for you?
i need add
Do I need to pay to add users?
Yes would let sales to provide you price about license (adding agent limit)
Oh yes, basic plan only contain one admin account
I need 10 customer service representatives to use this number, so I need to add 10 users, right?
Yes, you could add as much as you wish, with the price provide by sales.
Can't I upgrade it myself on the website? Do I have to contact sales?
Adding license for additional agent is not like buy a number.
So I am afraid that it could not be done by yourself.
Let me ask Gina talk to you?
room.join
I need to add ten users. How much will it cost?
I have no idea about the exact price, you need to check with Gina
Let me forward the request to her?
Hi
I am Gina
Yes, you need to upgrade your current plan to Omnichannel Contact Center plan to add more user licenses
How do I need to upgrade?
I need an upgrade.
hi
Hi, Gina would follow the request with mail
I will prepare an eQuote covering the service upgrade to you for your consideration. How many licenses do yiu want to have? 10, right?
hi
When can I upgrade my account?! Your work efficiency is so low!

It is holiday, please check with Gina.
Merry christmas
room.leave
room.leave
enquiry.terminate
